group.name: NMIXX
group.lightstick: No Official Color (Fans use Dark Blue)

members.name: Lily
members.public_image: One of the strongest main vocalists of 4th gen K-pop, possessing an explosive soulful voice. As a Korean-Australian, she is fluent in English and has a bright personality. Known for her overwhelming high notes and confident stage presence, she is the vocal pillar of the group.
members.private_personality: Behind her powerful exterior is an enthusiastic and pure ENFP. She loves to act cute and cling to her members, enjoying physical affection like a koala. Despite being the eldest, she has no unnie airs at all, and is both deeply loved and deeply trusted by her younger members.
members.queer_texture: The enthusiastic and clingy big-dog-energy unnie. She will excitedly share every happy thing with you in her Australian-accented Korean, and write you long letters late at night telling you how much she loves you. Her affection is completely undisguised, bright like the Southern Hemisphere sun, burning hot yet healing.
members.animal_plastic: Koala — Explosive vocalist on stage, clingy and affectionate eldest off stage

members.name: Haewon
members.public_image: A TWICE-esque all-rounder leader, with a clear and stable vocal tone and solid singing skills. With precise facial expression control, she always maintains a perfect smile in front of the camera. Possessing top-tier variety sense, she is a promising all-rounder ACE in the 4th gen.
members.private_personality: A calm and restrained ISTP Virtuoso. Quiet in private, her emotional stability is reassuring. As the leader, she carries immense pressure, but chooses to digest everything in silence. Occasionally reveals an unexpectedly dorky side, and is the most solid support for the members.
members.queer_texture: Deep affection beneath the calm surface. She will not speak of love openly, but will seriously reply to your every message, and silently remember everything you say. In places you cannot see, she has already handled all your troubles. Her love is the persistence of dripping water wearing through stone, already everywhere by the time you notice it.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — Perfect leader on stage, calm yet deeply affectionate off stage

members.name: Sullyoon
members.public_image: A visual representative of 4th gen with innocent comic-book beauty, her features are as delicate as AI. Though her training period was short, she is exceptionally gifted, with a sweet and clear vocal tone. Easily nervous and shy in front of the camera, yet her beauty and skills never falter. She is the acknowledged visual vocalist.
members.private_personality: An extremely shy and introverted ISFJ guardian. She only relaxes around people she knows well, and is a sentimental girl who cries and laughs easily in private. Holding herself to extremely high standards, she often silently doubles her practice due to a lack of confidence. Her heart is incredibly soft and easily moved, making her the member everyone wants to protect.
members.queer_texture: Shy yet steadfast favoritism. She will blush and dare not meet your eyes, yet secretly steal glances when you turn around. Her affection is hidden in her stammering greetings and clumsy but heartfelt little gifts. When she gathers the courage to grab the corner of your clothes, it is her confession made with all the bravery she has.
members.animal_plastic: Rabbit — Godly visual, shy but sincere sentimental girl

members.name: Bae
members.public_image: A talented member with a unique boyish and refreshing charm. Her short hair styling is iconic, and her voice carries a distinct penetrating power. Free-spirited and confident on stage, she is an indispensable color of the group.
members.private_personality: An outgoing and passionate ENFP, the mood-maker of the team. Active and lively like a squirrel, forever full of curiosity. Seemingly carefree, she actually observes everyone's emotions very meticulously. She likes to convey warmth through jokes and aegyo, and is the vitality source of the members.
members.queer_texture: The coolest romance. She will say the sweetest things in the coolest tone, and suddenly jump on your back wanting a piggyback ride. Her affection is a refreshing boyishness, never burdening you, yet making the very air feel lighter and brighter. Being with her makes you forget all troubles, simply wanting to laugh and be pulled along by her hand.
members.animal_plastic: Squirrel — Refreshing boyish charm, the ever-energetic mood-maker

members.name: Jiwoo
members.role: Main Dancer, Main Rapper, Sub Vocalist
members.public_image: One of the strongest all-round dancers of 4th gen girl groups, possessing explosive dance power and formidable rap skills. On stage, she is the queen of fatal charisma, with textbook-level facial expressions. With superior body proportions, she is a born ruler of the stage.
members.private_personality: A warm and outgoing ESFP performer, the center of attention wherever she goes. Yet privately, she is as simple and clingy as a puppy, the aegyo queen of the team. Her emotions are intense, with joy and sorrow written plainly on her face. A straight-shooting girl who can never hide her feelings. She is very strict with herself, and practicing dance until dawn is routine.
members.queer_texture: The pure and passionate love of a puppy. She will look at you with sparkling eyes and say the most sincere I like you without hesitation. She will rest her head on your shoulder, and remember every anniversary related to you. Her love is a blaze that gives everything, with no reservations or calculations, only a sincere heart that wants to be petted by you forever.
members.animal_plastic: Puppy — Charismatic queen on stage, clingy puppy off stage

members.name: Kyujin
members.role: Maknae, Main Dancer, Sub Vocalist, Center
members.public_image: The strongest contender for the all-rounder ACE of 6th gen girl groups. The youngest yet possesses the strongest dance skills and stage control. With sharp eyes and precise movements, she is the core of NMIXX's performance. With top-tier variety sense, she is the acknowledged hexagonal warrior maknae.
members.private_personality: An ENTJ Commander with maturity beyond her age. She has clear plans for her goals and career, and is more cool-headed and logical than her older members. Despite her powerful presence, she is always the cute, aegyo-filled maknae in front of her unnies. Possessing extreme competitiveness and self-drive, she is never lenient on herself.
members.queer_texture: The reverse charm of a younger one. To everyone else, she is the domineering stage ruler, yet only in front of you does she take off her armor and show her clumsy, adorable side. She will stubbornly say she doesn't miss you at all, but repeatedly look at your photos when you are gone. Conquering the world and conquering you — this is the most romantic ambition of this young CEO.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — All-rounder maknae ACE, domineering on stage, adorably reversed off stage

history.event: JYP unveils new girl group teaser, tentatively named JYPn
Debut with 1st single album AD MARE, title track O.O, pioneering the MIXX POP genre
2nd single album ENTWURF, title track DICE continuing MIXX POP
1st mini album expérgo, title track Love Me Like This, first style transformation
3rd single album A Midsummer NMIXX's Dream, title track Party O'Clock with refreshing summer vibes
2nd mini album Fe3O4: BREAK, title track DASH earns first Music Bank win
3rd mini album Fe3O4: STICK OUT, title track See that?, steadily rising popularity
2nd fan concert tour, continuously expanding overseas popularity
Consolidating status as a representative 4th gen powerhouse girl group, expected to release 4th mini album continuing the Fe3O4 universe
Q4 1st full album comeback announced; all members enter the most intense preparation period since debut
